name: @render/archie-viewer
description: The <archie-viewer> embeddable custom element (ADR-0019). Shadow-DOM read-only viewer: open a .archie.zip (drop / src=URL / published-tree base), render the gallery → object grid → lazy deep-zoom reader (createReadOnlyMount — OSD, no Annotorious/pixi, no unsafe-eval). All load state lives on the element INSTANCE (Phase-4 per-element seam), never module globals.
